channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: I never expected this response ~robot-toast
item.description: It started with an SSO project. I was building an IDP server — the kind that handles authentication across connected domains. I wanted a Google-like widget, the one that shows up and says "Hey,...

item.title: Pairing PHY chips with Gigabit network transformers is less “universal” than I expected
item.description: Pairing PHY chips with Gigabit network transformers is less “universal” than I expected I’ve been validating a few 1000Base-T designs recently, and something that looked simple at first ended up...

item.title: Stop using UUID v4 as your database primary key
item.description: I spent a while wondering why inserts on a particular table were getting slower as it grew. The table had a UUID v4 primary key and a few indexes. The data wasn't huge - a few million rows - but...

item.title: The AI-First API Gateway: Why Your 2026 Strategy Needs More Than Just "Management
item.description: In the fast-moving world of software architecture, we’ve spent a decade perfecting the "API-First" approach. We built gateways to handle humans and web apps. But as we move through 2026, a new...

item.title: AI Agent Frameworks Compared: LangChain vs Custom vs Agentic Systems
item.description: AI agents are rapidly moving from experimental prototypes to production infrastructure. Developers are no longer just building chatbots. They’re building systems capable of: Multi-step reasoning...

item.title: How to Use Claude API with Python: Complete Beginner's Guide (2026)
item.description: The Anthropic Python SDK makes it simple to integrate Claude into your applications. In this guide you'll go from zero to a working chatbot in under 10 minutes — covering installation, your first...

item.title: IIS Log Analyzer: Transforming IIS Logs into Operational and Security Intelligence
item.description: Transforming IIS Logs into Operational and Security Intelligence IIS Log Analyzer is a Windows desktop tool designed for IIS administrators, DevOps teams, and security analysts who need faster...

item.title: Stop hand-syncing Claude Code and Codex configs
item.description: If you've spent any time in Claude Code or Codex, your config tree is probably substantial: ~/.claude/{settings.json, agents/, skills/, .mcp.json, CLAUDE.md} ~/.codex/{config.toml, AGENTS.md} plus...

item.title: My GitHub Copilot Sessions Kept Degrading -- So I Built a Skill to Fix It
item.description: You've probably experienced this. You're 30 minutes into a productive Copilot agent session, things are flowing well -- and then something shifts. The agent asks you to clarify something it...

item.title: Sony’s PS5 sales plummet amid price rises and a memory crisis
item.description: Sony sold just 1.5 million PS5 consoles in its most recent fourth fiscal quarter, down 46 percent year over year. The slump in PS5 sales comes after Sony raised the price of its PS5 consoles twice...

item.title: HMAC-attested receipts for AI agent tool calls — verify-action-mcp
item.description: What I built (in one paragraph) verify-action-mcp is a small third-party HTTP service. You POST a (claim, evidence) pair from an AI agent, you get back a verdict and an HMAC-attested receipt....

item.title: Here’s how technology transformed babymaking
item.description: Technology is changing the way we make babies. The pioneering work of the scientists who invented IVF led to the birth of the first “test tube baby” in 1978. We’ve come a long, long way since...

item.title: Nintendo is raising Switch 2 prices
item.description: Nintendo is raising the price of its Switch 2 console globally, "in light of changes in market conditions," and is now forecasting a drop in sales over the next year. Starting September 1st, the...

item.title: MedQA: Fine-Tuning a Clinical AI on AMD ROCm — No CUDA Required
Linux Kernel Dirty Frag LPE Exploit Enables Root Access Across Major Distributions
item.description: Details have emerged about a new, unpatched local privilege escalation (LPE) vulnerability impacting the Linux kernel. Dubbed Dirty Frag, it has been described as a successor to Copy Fail...

item.title: Why you can never get your doctor to call you back
item.description: Like many AI companies automating work that humans currently do, Basata will eventually face a harder question about where the line is between augmenting workers and displacing them. For now, the...

item.title: Canvas Breach Disrupts Schools & Colleges Nationwide
item.description: An ongoing data extortion attack targeting the widely-used education technology platform Canvas disrupted classes and coursework at school districts and universities across the United States...

item.title: Musk v. Altman Evidence Shows What Microsoft Executives Thought of OpenAI
item.description: Leaders at the tech giant were skeptical of OpenAI—but wary of pushing it into the arms of Amazon, according to emails dating back to 2018.

item.title: OpenAI launches new voice intelligence features in its API
item.description: The new features could be handy for customer service systems, but OpenAI says they have applications that work across a variety of other fields, including education and creator platforms.

item.title: Trump Pivots on AI Regulation, Worker Ousted by DOGE Runs for Office, and Hantavirus Explained
item.description: Today on Uncanny Valley, we’re diving into recent reports that the Trump administration is considering an executive order that would establish some sort of federal oversight over new AI models.

item.title: Canvas is down as ShinyHunters threatens to leak schools’ data
item.description: The Instructure-owned learning management platform, Canvas, is down after recently confirming a massive data breach that impacted student names, email addresses, ID numbers, and messages. Students...

item.title: Voi founders’ new AI startup Pit has become the latest rising star out of Stockholm
item.description: AI startup Pit is led by the co-founders of European scooter giant Voi and backed by a16z, which is leading the startup’s $16 million seed round.

item.title: How to Disable Google's Gemini in Chrome
item.description: Chrome users were caught off guard by a 4-GB Google AI model baked into Chrome, sparking privacy concerns. The good news: You can easily uninstall it. The bad? You might not want to.

item.title: OpenAI introduces new ‘Trusted Contact’ safeguard for cases of possible self-harm
item.description: The company is expanding its efforts to protect ChatGPT users in cases where conversations may turn to self-harm.

item.title: Perplexity’s Personal Computer is now available to everyone on Mac
item.description: Perplexity's Personal Computer brings AI agents to your Mac, and is now open to everyone.

item.title: Mira Murati’s deposition pulled back the curtain on Sam Altman’s ouster
item.description: The week leading up to Thanksgiving 2023 was the AI industry's biggest soap opera moment. OpenAI CEO Sam Altman was abruptly ousted from his role at the ChatGPT maker. The explanation? That Altman...

item.title: Apple’s AirPods with cameras for AI are apparently close to production
item.description: Apple's rumored AirPods with cameras are nearing a stage where the company will test early mass production, Bloomberg's Mark Gurman reports. Currently, Apple testers are "actively using"...

item.title: SpaceX has a $55 billion plan to build AI chips in Texas
item.description: Elon Musk's plans to get into the AI chip manufacturing business are going to be costly. As the New York Times and CNBC report, SpaceX is planning to invest at least $55 billion into its "Terafab"...

item.title: Mozilla says 271 vulnerabilities found by Mythos have "almost no false positives"
item.description: The developer of Firefox says it has "completely bought in" on AI-assisted bug discovery.

item.title: Peak Design is taking up to 50 percent off some of our favorite camera bags
item.description: To celebrate founder Peter Dering’s birthday, Peak Design is taking up to 50 percent off a host of bags and accessories through May 8. The sale includes steep discounts on many of the company’s...
